tool.name: Google Model Armor
tool.description: Model-agnostic prompt and response safety screening layer across Google enterprise infrastructure.
tool.logoNotes: Google Cloud does not expose a standalone public Model Armor logo on the official product page; this uses the owner-controlled Google Cloud header logo (`https://www.gstatic.com/cgc/google-cloud-logo.svg`) as the shared vendor mark for the service.
tool.practitionerNote: Worth evaluating for Google-first estates that need managed prompt and response protection, especially around injection and unsafe content controls.

dataResidency.detail: US/EU regional endpoints; in-memory processing without durable retention unless logging enabled.

deployment.detail: Stateless cloud-native SaaS via regional API; standalone or with Security Command Center.

auditLogging.detail: Audit logs via Cloud Logging filtering on modelarmor.googleapis.com.

soc2.detail: Runs on SOC 2 Type II Google Cloud infrastructure.

iso27001.detail: Runs on ISO/IEC 27001-certified Google Cloud infrastructure.

iso42001.detail: Model Armor not confirmed in Google Cloud ISO 42001 scope as of 2026-05.

euAiAct.detail: Prompt/response screening component; supports operators' compliance, not itself high-risk.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary GCP SaaS; full dependency on GCP.
